title: Three-table JOIN
prompt_md: Which movie is each booking for? A booking points at a showtime, and a showtime points at a movie. Return the booking's `id` aliased as `booking_id` and the movie `title`. Join `bookings` -> `showtimes` -> `movies`.
starter_code:
SELECT b.id AS booking_id, m.title
FROM bookings b
JOIN showtimes s ON b.showtime_id = s.id
JOIN movies m ON s.movie_id = m.id;
hints: Chain two JOINs: first bookings to showtimes, then showtimes to movies.
Each `JOIN ... ON ...` links one table's foreign key to the next table's primary key.
reference_solution: SELECT b.id AS booking_id, m.title FROM bookings b JOIN showtimes s ON b.showtime_id = s.id JOIN movies m ON s.movie_id = m.id;
